REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVILA, VIVIANE CALABRIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STORAGE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-03-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES AGREE TO THE FOLLOWING SETTLEMENT: 1.)PLAINTIFF WILL PAY DEFENDANT $445.00 IN CERTIFIED FUNDS ON OR BEFORE 12PM ON MAY 2, 2016; 2.)ONCE PAID, DEFENDANT WILL REMOVE ITS LOCK ON UNIT 159; 3.)PLAINTIFF WILL REMOVE ALL ITEMS OF PROPERTY FROM UNIT 159 ON OR BEFORE 6PM ON MAY 16, 2016; 4.)PLAINTIFF AGREES TO RELEASE HER INTEREST IN THE ITEMS OF PROPERTY IN UNIT 159 IF SHE DOES NOT MAKE THE REQUIRED PAYMENT AND/OR DOES NOT REMOVE THE ITEMS OF PROPERTY AS SPECIFIED IN THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
